text:
Created attachment 198727
FreeBSD boot failure

Myself and a few people are unable to boot FreeBSD 11.2 on the HP Gen8 Microserver, about 80% of the time.   There's a failure with the loader.

Please see this bug for details and screeshots: https://redmine.ixsystems.com/issues/52441

I will re-attach some of the screenshots here that are only FREEBSD 11.2 related.
